title: Hide Body Parts
description: Use NBT data to hide player body parts.
body: # Hide Body Parts Utility mod for Fabric Minecraft. ## Invisible Body Parts Use the `cardinal_components.hide-body-parts:hidden_parts` NBT compound list on a player entity to hide their body parts. Currently available Body Parts: | Body Part | name | |---|---| | HEAD | "head" | | BODY | "body" | | RIGHT ARM | "r_arm" | | LEFT ARM | "l_arm" | | RIGHT LEG | "r_leg" | | LEFT LEG | "l_leg" | ### Commands Toggle body parts: `/hide bodyPart changeEntry bodyPartName target` Reset all body parts to visible: `/hide bodyPart removeAllEntries target` Still need an example of how the NBT is structured in-game? Use the previously mentioned commands to disable a body part and use minecraft's `/data get entity @p cardinal_components.hide-body-parts:hidden_parts` command to inspect the listed nbt values of the disabled body parts. ## Invisible Armor Prevent armor rendering with the new - Invisible Armor Enchantment - `invisible_armor` Item Tag - custom Boolean NBT value on the ItemStack, called `InvisibleArmor` Note, that this is only a very basic implementation. External Mods, which don't make use of Minecraft's Armor Rendering, might not work in this case.
